differences.new: method java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture dev.langchain4j.guardrail.GuardrailExecutor, R extends dev.langchain4j.guardrail.GuardrailResult, G extends dev.langchain4j.guardrail.Guardrail, E extends dev.langchain4j.observability.api.event.GuardrailExecutedEvent>::executeAsync(P)
differences.justification: GuardrailExecutor is a sealed interface that only permits AbstractGuardrailExecutor (implemented within langchain4j-core), so no external code can implement it. Adding the non-blocking executeAsync counterpart is therefore not a breaking change for API consumers; revapi does not model interface sealing.
